docs.text: Memphis v5 publishing checklist includes docs, changelog, smoke tests, and package verification.
Security-first defaults require chain integrity checks, signed artifacts, and strict provider policy.
Codex agent handoff should include context summary, constraints, and verification commands.
Retrieval benchmark gate tracks recall, MRR, and historical regression thresholds.
Refactor and cleanup focus on removing duplication, tightening types, and reducing repeated computation.
Memory chain records decisions, links context, and supports fast recall for recent work.
